title: Full-Stack Engineer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Full-Stack Engineer with strong experience building scalable web and mobile applications, and hands-on exposure to AI-powered solutions. The role focuses on engineering quality, performance, and clean architecture, with the expectation that the engineer understands how to implement good UI/UX, even if they are not the primary designer.

You will work closely with backend, data, and AI teams to deliver production-grade applications that integrate AI services, real-time data, and modern APIs.


Key Responsibilities

• Build and maintain production-grade front-end and full-stack applications using React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript

• Develop backend services in Python to support web and AI-enabled applications

• Design and implement clean, modular application architectures with a focus on performance and scalability

• Integrate applications with AI/ML services (e.g. model inference APIs, embeddings, AI-driven workflows)

• Implement and consume REST APIs and real-time services

• Ensure applications are reliable, secure, and maintainable through testing, debugging, and code reviews


Required Skills

• Strong experience with React and modern front-end development

• Proficiency in JavaScript / TypeScript

• Solid backend development experience in Python (Django, FastAPI, or Flask)

• Experience with Node.js / Express.js or equivalent

• Hands-on experience integrating AI solutions into applications

• Good understanding of API design, application architecture, and databases

• Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS or equivalent) and Git-based workflows


Nice to Have

• Experience with LLM-based applications, RAG pipelines, or AI-powered search

• Exposure to ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch) or model deployment

• Experience with real-time systems (WebSockets, Socket.io)

• Knowledge of security best practices for web applications

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
